protocol.restart_note: Single-start fit from textbook x0; no multi-restart loop in the script as run.

x0_textbook.source: Weidmann 1993 (gamma, rho_max); Helbing et al. 2000 (A, B)

bounds_soft_penalty.note: Soft bounds via penalty return, not box constraints.

results.results_source: STATUS.json @ 8206f28 (the full eval-history artefact results/calibration.json was written at runtime but never committed; only the summary survives)

gaps: Single-start, not multi-restart. Global optimum not confirmed.
Full evaluation history (results/calibration.json) was never committed; only STATUS.json summary available.
NM tolerances (xatol=0.01, fatol=0.001) are loose for a 4-parameter fit with A spanning 500..10000.
Soft bounds via penalty=5.0 rather than hard box constraints. Fit landed comfortably interior so this is cosmetic.
A and B not separately identifiable from FD data alone; see closed-form argument in revision-notes/06-calibration.md (Phase C).
